title: Leave loading from an hourly rate
problem: Nina earns $\$25.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. Calculate her annual leave loading.

steps.instruction: Find four weeks' normal pay. Leave loading is calculated on four weeks' pay.
Calculate leave loading at $17.5\%$ of four weeks' pay.

title: Commission on sales
problem: A real-estate agent earns a commission of $6\%$ on all sales. She sells a property for $\$8500$. Calculate her commission.

steps.instruction: Identify the commission rate and the sales value.
Apply the formula: commission $=$ commission rate $\times$ sales.

title: Total annual income from salary, leave loading and commission
problem: Aisha has an annual base salary of $\$45\,760$ (which is $\$880$ per week). She receives annual leave loading of $17.5\%$ on four weeks' normal pay, and earns a commission of $3\%$ on $\$72\,000$ of sales. Calculate her total annual income.

steps.instruction: Calculate four weeks' normal pay using the weekly rate.
Calculate leave loading at $17.5\%$ of four weeks' pay.
Add base salary, leave loading and commission to find total annual income.
